title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei decide what to build with Claude, distilling their approach into four rules. The video frames these rules as a general framework for avoiding poorly-chosen projects across side projects, startups, and job optimization.
